name: Opencode Dev Container
postCreateCommand: apt-get update && apt-get install -y unzip ca-certificates && curl -fsSL https://apt.releases.hashicorp.com/gpg | gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/hashicorp-archive-keyring.gpg && echo "deb [arch=amd64 signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/hashicorp-archive-keyring.gpg] https://apt.releases.hashicorp.com \$(lsb_release -cs) main" | tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/hashicorp.list && apt-get update && apt-get install -y terraform tflint yamllint awscli
